sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince iterative optimal f method: adjust portfolio weighting E (variance target parameter) upward when calculated variance < E, downward when variance > E, until geometric optimal portfolio convergence. Uses variance equations (6.06a-6.06d) and covariance optimization with weight constraints.

source_rule_text: Iteratively adjust portfolio weighting (E) based on variance comparison to target: increase E if variance is less than target, decrease E if variance exceeds target, until geometric optimal portfolio is achieved.
